notes: It is unplayable. Only the first screen to start the game is showing.
title: Order of Battle: World War II

notes: With a Grafikcard change it works now smoothly. Only the video sequences are not working
title: Order of Battle: World War II

notes:
Test without starting option didn't work. 
2nd try was with 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%' but brought me only to the game launcher, while starting game lead me into a black screen. 
On 3rd test I used 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=2 %command%' and launcher and game worked. 
There is one little issue, when I start game from launcher I first get into a black screen, but after a while when I click somewhere the game menue shows up. Rest works as intended.
title: Order of Battle: World War II

notes: Game runs without major issues out of the box, just the videos are not working. great performance.
title: Order of Battle: World War II
